text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you familiar with the Three
Goddesses statue?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Three Goddesses... The progenitors
of all Umamusume, according to legend.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They are also described as deities who
watch over and guide the Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Traditionally, the students of Tracen
Academy come before this statue to
pass on their ambition.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The days spent running toward their
dreams, the emotions experienced on
their journeys... All of this is entrusted to
this statue.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Future generations of runners come here
to inherit this ambition and, if they are
so lucky, turn it into power.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And so the legacy of one runner is
passed on to the next, and the next... It's
quite mysterious, isn't it?
